title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 61. LOUISIANA COMMUNITY HEALTH WORKER WORKFORCE

§3721. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Community Health Worker Workforce Act".

            Acts 2023, No. 182, §2.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 61.  LOUISIANA COMMUNITY HEALTH WORKER WORKFORCE
§3721.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Community Health
Worker Workforce Act".
Acts 2023, No. 182, §2.
